title: Google Linux package signing keys include 1024-bit DSA key
bounty_rationale: Thank you reward for allowing us to make a security relevant change to better protect out Chrome supply chain.
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
  
Chrome Linux (Debian) Package Repository Ships Weak DSA 1024 bit key  
  
**VERSION**   
  
Chrome Version: any  
Operating System: any Debian / APT based  
  
**REPRODUCTION CASE**   
  
As per 14 March 2021, Google wants you to run the following command.  
  
http:/
